name: Mini Porta Cabin
description:
Mini Porta Cabin — Compact Footprint, Full MS Construction

A mini porta cabin from SAMAN is a factory-built cabin in sub-10-ft configurations — designed for deployments where the available space physically cannot accommodate a standard cabin and where the buyer needs the smallest functional MS structure available from a manufacturer.

Which Size for Which Application — The Mini Porta Cabin Range

Before ordering, the right size comes from the application — not a preference. Each configuration below matches a specific deployment constraint.

Application Size What Fits Inside
Standing guard post, document shelf only 6×6 ft One stool, one A4 shelf, one window
Single-person gate cabin with sitting desk 6×8 ft One desk, one chair, one window each side
Gate cabin with desk and turn room 8×8 ft One desk, one chair, one visitor position
Small gate office or pump station shelter 8×10 ft One desk, two chairs, small shelf unit

8×10 ft mini porta cabin used as a compact site office at construction site

The 6×6 ft is the minimum factory-built MS porta cabin in SAMAN's range — a standing-entry single-person cabin with no room for a chair. The 6×8 ft is the most commonly ordered mini configuration in India — enough for a single guard or operator to sit, work, and monitor a gate for a full shift. The 8×8 ft gives a sitting person room to stand up, turn, and receive one visitor without either party leaving the cabin. The 8×10 ft is the transitional size — functional for two people briefly but not configured as a standard site office.

If your requirement reaches 10×10 ft or larger, that size range is covered on a separate page.

MS Corrugated Steel at Mini Scale — Why It Matters at a Permanent Gate Post

A 6×8 ft cabin placed at a building entrance or estate gate is touched, brushed, and knocked every day of its service life. Three specific points make IS 2062 MS corrugated steel the right material for a permanent gate post cabin — and make FRP the wrong choice at this deployment type.

Impact resistance at entry: A vehicle brushing the cabin corner, a gate barrier arm making contact with the sidewall, a security guard pushing the door at full force. MS corrugated steel panels at standard 18-gauge thickness deflect and dent — they do not crack. FRP at 4mm wall thickness cracks at impact contact points. A cracked FRP panel on a customer-facing gate cabin looks abandoned within 2 to 3 years.

Panel replaceability at gate scale: A 6×8 ft or 8×8 ft cabin has wall panels of 8 to 10 square feet each — small sections that a local fabricator can cut out and replace individually. When a vehicle clips the cabin corner or a barrier arm makes contact, the affected panel is replaced in 2 to 3 hours at Rs 600 to Rs 1,200 for a mini-scale section. On an FRP mini cabin of the same footprint, a cracked panel disrupts the structural shell — FRP cannot be cut and patched at gate post scale without specialist equipment.

Lifespan at a permanently manned location: IS 2062 MS with correct surface treatment and repainting every 2 to 3 years lasts 20+ years at a high-contact gate post. FRP at a permanently manned, high-contact installation typically requires panel replacement within 3 to 5 years — the lifespan advantage disappears at fixed continuous deployment.

MS corrugated mini cabin used as a durable gate security cabin

For buyers who want the full IS 2062 Grade A frame specification — steel grade, frame dimensions, and surface treatment process — our ms porta cabin page covers the complete material detail.

Standard Fitout in a 6×8 ft Cabin — What Fits and What Does Not

Every SAMAN 6×8 ft mini porta cabin leaves the factory with the following pre-fitted: one 3-foot aluminium sliding window on each long face, one lockable steel entry door with key, one LED tube light on the ceiling, one 5A power socket with 6-point distribution board provision, and one AC mounting bracket with pre-wired conduit on the short wall.

With 48 square feet of floor area, a 6×8 ft cabin comfortably holds one standard 2.5×1.5 ft desk, one chair, one wall-mounted A4 register shelf, and a CCTV monitor or telephone handset on the desk. These are the practical limits of the configuration. A full-height storage cabinet, a second chair for a visitor, or a printer on a separate table do not fit without displacing the desk position. If these workspace elements are required, the 8×8 ft configuration at 64 square feet resolves the constraint — the sizing table in H2 1 confirms which configuration is right.

Typical 6×8 ft mini porta cabin setup for single-user workspace

Placing a Mini Porta Cabin at a Gate — Installation in Tight Spaces

A mini porta cabin placed at a building entrance, housing society gate, or highway toll island presents one installation challenge that larger cabins do not face: the delivery access and positioning point may be narrower than the cabin itself.

Every SAMAN mini porta cabin is fabricated with 4-point crane lifting eyes welded to the IS 2062 base frame skids — positioned at all four corners. A standard mobile crane can lift the cabin from the delivery truck and position it in a gate island as narrow as 8 feet wide. The 6×8 ft cabin can be positioned in a gate island measuring as small as 7×9 ft with crane placement — no manual dragging or disassembly required.

Mini porta cabin positioned neatly at commercial site entrance

For covered parking structures, basement entry points, or underground access roads where crane access is unavailable, a forklift with a minimum 2-tonne capacity and 1.5-metre fork extension can position the mini cabin at ground level. Confirm your installation access point — gate width, overhead clearance, and ground surface — at the order stage. SAMAN confirms the correct positioning method for your site before dispatch.

Installation time for a standard gate post placement on a pre-prepared concrete plinth: 2 to 3 hours.

For buyers ready to confirm their order and delivery details, our buy porta cabins page covers the purchase process, payment schedule, and what is included at handover.

Mini Porta Cabin vs Security Cabin — When Each Is the Right Choice

A SAMAN mini porta cabin in 6×6 to 8×10 ft configuration starts from Rs 45,000 to Rs 75,000 depending on size and fitout. It is the right choice when the available site footprint is the primary constraint — the gate island is 8 feet wide, the entrance alcove measures 6×6 ft, or the site specification simply requires the smallest available factory-built cabin.

A purpose-built security cabin from SAMAN's security range starts from Rs 55,000 to Rs 95,000 — it is designed for applications where guard visibility and duty comfort are the primary requirement: corner-view glazing for 270-degree observation, raised floor level for road-level visibility, guard ergonomics for 12-hour duty shifts.

The deciding question is simple: is the constraint footprint, or is the constraint guard function? Footprint drives the mini porta cabin decision. Guard function drives the security cabin decision. If your gate island is 8 feet wide and your guard needs to sit and monitor, a mini porta cabin is the right and more economical product. If your guard needs to observe a large vehicle yard from an elevated position, our security cabins page is the right destination.

Mini porta cabin used in industrial environment with added features

For the full SAMAN porta cabin range — all sizes, materials, and delivery options — see our porta cabins hub page.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the smallest porta cabin SAMAN manufactures, and what is the minimum floor footprint?

The smallest factory-built MS porta cabin in SAMAN's range is 6×6 ft — a 36 square foot standing-entry cabin with one window, one lockable door, and one LED ceiling fitting. The external footprint including the IS 2062 base frame skids is approximately 6.2×6.2 ft. Below 6×6 ft, the structural frame-to-usable-space ratio becomes impractical for any standing occupancy.

Can a 6×8 ft mini porta cabin be delivered through a standard single-leaf vehicle gate that is 9 feet wide?

Yes. A 6×8 ft SAMAN mini porta cabin has an external width of approximately 6.2 ft — it passes through a 9-foot vehicle gate with 2.8 feet of clearance on each side when transported flat on a delivery truck. For installation through a gate into a compound where the cabin will remain, the gate opening must be at least 8 feet wide for the crane to position the cabin sideways. Confirm your gate opening dimensions at the order stage and SAMAN confirms the correct delivery and positioning sequence.

Can a window be added to a blank wall of a mini porta cabin after delivery — for example, on the short end wall for additional ventilation?

Yes. MS corrugated steel walls can be field-cut and fitted with a standard aluminium sliding window after delivery. The cut opening requires a structural angle-iron frame welded around the perimeter before the window frame is fitted — a job for a local fabricator in 3 to 4 hours. If a window on the short end wall is required, SAMAN can factory-fit it before dispatch for lower cost and a cleaner finish than field cutting.

Tell us your gate island dimensions, application, and required fitout.

We will confirm the right mini porta cabin size, standard fitout, and delivery timeline within 24 hours.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937

🔲 Sub-10-ft footprint · IS 2062 MS steel · Gate post · Toll booth · Crane-positionable

Mini porta cabin from 6×6 ft — smallest factory-built IS 2062 MS cabin available. Gate posts, toll booths, and tight-space deployments where a standard cabin physically does not fit.

Size
10′ × 10′ × 9′
Range
6×6 ft to 8×10 ft
Delivery
7–21 Working Days
Frame
IS 2062 Grade A MS
Brand
SAMAN Portable
Best For
Gate Posts · Toll Booths · Tight Plots

From Rs 45,000 · Fits 8-ft gate island · 4-point crane eyes · 2–3 hr install
